props.message:
THE INITIATES

A candle-lit row of novices. Each is responsible for waking one of the realm's morning ceremonies. Twelve in all — five here today, the others at their posts.

root.speaker: Initiate Olm
root.text:
*kneeling, eyes closed*

'By the breath of the Maker, the morning is opened. By the Source, the dawn-shrine wakes. Walk the realm, walk it well...'

*she does not pause for you.*

root.speaker: Initiate Belth
root.text:
*low, steady*

'The wells are blessed at first light. The kettles are blessed at second. The ovens at third. The hearth at fourth, and so on, to the twelfth, which is the last...'

*his voice is calm enough to fall asleep to.*

root.speaker: Initiate Ress
root.text:
*opens his eyes wide*

Walker — please. I've forgotten my recantation. The seventh line. It opens the kettle-shrine for the noon-cooks and I cannot remember it.

Is it 'by the breath of the Maker' or 'by the breath of the Source'?

choices.label: By the breath of the Maker.
By the breath of the Source.

right.speaker: Initiate Ress
right.text:
Yes! Yes — that's it. By the breath of the Maker the kettle-shrine wakes.

Lirien's breath, walker, you saved me a scolding. Walk well. Walk very well.

wrong.speaker: Initiate Ress
wrong.text:
Hm. Maybe. I'll try it.

*he doesn't look convinced.*

patience.speaker: Initiate Ress
patience.text:
Fair. Fair. I'll keep at it.

Maybe Belth will tell me. Belth never forgets a line.

bye.speaker: Initiate Ress
bye.text: Walk well, walker. By the breath of the Maker.

root.speaker: Initiate Maro
root.text:
*humming a long, low note. Her hands are folded. Her eyes are open and not looking at anything.*

*the tone shifts up half a step. Then back down.*

root.speaker: Initiate Quenn
root.text:
*reciting fast, almost under his breath*

'...and the gardens, and the orchards, and the brooks, and the wells, and the smaller wells, and the unspoken wells, and the smaller unspoken wells, and—'

*he doesn't notice you.*

bye.speaker: Initiate Quenn
bye.text: *he is already on the next line.*
